channel.title: susi.vidal
channel.description: trying to make cooking fun stay horngry 📧: team@susividal.com

item.title: Hi 🥹 first things first, ignore my beautiful stye. I was goin...
item.description:
Hi 🥹 first things first, ignore my beautiful stye. I was going to wait to post until it was gone but we’re going on week 3 with it, I fear she’s here to stay for a bit. Thank you to everyone who’s reached out, given me encouragement or shared similar stories. Your perseverance has inspired me immensely I dont think I have all the words for how im doing. It feels like a loss of identity, and im grieving a part of myself that meant the world. I’m trying to remain grateful (because fuck, I have so much to be grateful for). To be honest, recently ive had more good days than bad. Baby steps. I think I’m on the mend but we all know grief isn’t linear. Thanks for sticking around 🫶 PS I LOVE THIS CAULIFLOWER KORMA RECIPE FROM
@Sohla El-Waylly
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
